'''kanulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadjustment|coadjustment]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadjustment|coadjustment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kanulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kænilith|kænilith]] || [[word:kænilij|kænilij]] || [[word:kænilish|kænilish]] || [[word:kænili|kænili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kanunuluth|kanunuluth]] || [[word:kanunuluj|kanunuluj]] || [[word:kanunulush|kanunulush]] || [[word:kanunulu|kanunulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kanuluth|kanuluth]] || [[word:kanuluj|kanuluj]] || [[word:kanulush|kanulush]] || [[word:kanulu|kanulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kanufluth|kanufluth]] || [[word:kanufluj|kanufluj]] || [[word:kanuflush|kanuflush]] || [[word:kanufluf|kanufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kanuluthu|kanuluthu]] || [[word:kanuluju|kanuluju]] || [[word:kanulushu|kanulushu]] || [[word:kanuluku|kanuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kanuluth|kanuluth]] || [[word:kanuluj|kanuluj]] || [[word:kanulush|kanulush]] || [[word:kanulu|kanulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kanuluthul|kanuluthul]] || [[word:kanulujul|kanulujul]] || [[word:kanulushul|kanulushul]] || [[word:kanulukul|kanulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kanuluthuthu|kanuluthuthu]] || [[word:kanulujuju|kanulujuju]] || [[word:kanulushushu|kanulushushu]] || [[word:kanuluku|kanuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kanuluthun|kanuluthun]] || [[word:kanulujun|kanulujun]] || [[word:kanulushun|kanulushun]] || [[word:kanulukun|kanulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kanuluthuoro|kanuluthuoro]] || [[word:kanulujuoro|kanulujuoro]] || [[word:kanulushuoro|kanulushuoro]] || [[word:kanulukuoro|kanulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
